reviews.review_description: Good game, I'll be wait some more from this developer.
I love this game but it runs and looks terrible on Quest 2. This game is begging for a Quest 3 update!

developer_response.body: we have already made a special update for the quest 3: Higher resolution, better effects, and smoother gameplay thanks to the deactivation of SpaceWrap. This is especially noticeable when piloting airplanes and helicopters.

reviews.review_description: I love this game. It reminds me of those days at the arcade I would spend hours there. Really fun and easy going game. A great intro into a VR game but with a classic feel. Well done

Downloaded this on impulse as it showed arcade cabinets, like what you seen in that PCVR Arcade room. Sadly I don't have pcvr. Opened this up and it's amazing, side scrolling on the rails shooter with immersive parts. Must try for any shooter fan and arcade fans.
This is some average at best 2016 era stuff here.
At first I thought, what the hell is this? But after a few rounds I was very impressed. Different. Odd. Worth supporting.
Loved this,  up to the driving part,  really put me off,   but love the style of your games apart from that.

developer_response.body: Go to the options and select one-hand game mode. Replaced all immersion areas where driving is required with static ones. There's only one where it just goes straight

reviews.review_description: I love this game, and I am ready to buy, Let's Go!
Great arcade game let down by terrible motion sickness during the driving stage.

Fun game..  a little glitchie on the startup.
It would be nice to go right to the game at startup rather than viewing all the startup garbage.

Unique FPS experience from a big fan of 80s arcade.

Gameplay and review: https://youtu.be/xbMRuBxeYXg

I love this game!!!  Instantly had fun!! When will the full version be released.  
Not sure what’s going on with the people in the arcade, but that’s fun too!! 🤣
Played the demo, I liked game so far.  Driving was a bit of trial for me. I will purchase this soon as seems pretty cool.
Takes me back to the arcades.

Wow, i‘m really impressed! This little gem takes me back to the 80s and is one of the best games for the quest. I am still furious about this game. There are so muCh different and fun missions. I found myself screaming and giggling. Do yourself a favour and buy the full version.
